overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a green cloak walking through a snowy mountainous landscape. The character traverses from an open meadow through a forested area and into a rocky mountain pass, with snow-capped peaks visible in the distance throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain meadow with wooden fence line

events.description: a large bird flies overhead from right to left as the character looks up briefly

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snowy path beside a wooden fence, holding a wand in the right hand

entered.detail: towering snow-covered mountain range dominating the background
weathered wooden fence running parallel to the path
snow-dusted evergreen trees scattered across the landscape
uneven terrain covered in snow with exposed rocks and patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy meadow with a wooden fence running along the right side. Snow-capped mountains rise in the distance while scattered pine trees dot the left side of the landscape. A bird flies overhead as the character continues along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested approach to rocky mountain formations

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the environment transitions from open meadow to denser forest with large rock formations ahead

entered.detail: massive boulders and rocky outcroppings becoming prominent in the path ahead
thick cluster of snow-covered pine trees creating a denser forest edge

segments.scene_description: The path leads into a more forested area where pine trees grow denser on the left. Large rock formations begin to dominate the view ahead as the wooden fence disappears into the distance. The terrain remains snow-covered with patches of exposed rock and grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky mountain pass between large boulders

events.description: path narrows significantly as character enters a rocky corridor between massive boulders

agents.ego_description: walking through the confined rocky passage with snow-capped peaks visible through the gap ahead

entered.detail: massive snow-dusted boulder forming the left wall of the passage
large rocky outcropping forming the right wall of the narrow corridor
tall wooden post with a lantern or sign attached, standing beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky mountain pass flanked by massive boulders on both sides. A wooden signpost stands on the right side of the path. Through the gap in the rocks ahead, snow-capped mountains and a distant valley are visible as the path descends slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide snowy meadow that gradually narrows into a rugged mountain pass. It begins with the character walking along a wooden fence in an open landscape, where scattered pine trees and distant snow-capped peaks frame the view as a bird flies overhead. As the path progresses, the environment shifts into a denser forested area where the fence fades away and large rock formations begin to dominate the horizon. The scene then tightens as the character enters a narrow pass flanked by massive boulders, passing a wooden signpost on the right. Finally, the camera moves through the gap in the rocks to reveal a distant valley and towering mountains as the path descends.
